author: Kendra Barnett
title: LiveRamp Launches Brand Campaign on Netflix as Publicis Deal Fuels Scrutiny of its Neutrality
description: LiveRamp is pitching itself as a trustworthy foundation for AI marketing as ad industry players cast doubt on its ability to remain neutral under Publicis’ ownership.
